---
description: "Repository instructions for tech-stack."
---
# Tech Stack

## Language
- Java 8

## UI
- JavaFX

## Database
- SQLite (JDBC)

## Build Tool
- Maven

## Libraries
- Jackson (JSON)
- SLF4J (logging)
- Lombok (optional)

## Allowed
- Apache Commons (if needed)

## NOT Allowed (for now)
- Spring Boot
- Hibernate / JPA
- Complex frameworks
- Microservices

## Goal
Fast, simple, maintainable desktop prototype
